_comment: Generic fallback rule engine (Section 5.1). Used ONLY when no exact make/model/year match exists in vehicle_registry_specs. Editable without redeploying code — this is the single most important piece of general-purpose logic in the project, since it lets ANY vehicle get an immediate 'Estimated' answer from manufacturing year alone.
sources: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MoRTH) BS-VI notification timeline
Public manufacturer compliance statements (aggregated pattern, not vehicle-specific)
